channel.title: 链聘 ChainHire · 最新 Web3 岗位
channel.description: Web3 / crypto 行业全职能最新公开招聘，每日自动更新。

item.title: Smart Contract Security Engineer · Interop Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · $74k–$112k。5+ years web3 security engineering; strong Rust/Solidity/Go; deep cryptographic knowledge; hands-on penetration testing and code audit experience.

item.title: Blockchain Operations Engineer · Interop Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Blockchain network operations; release management and validator coordination; monitoring and deployment tooling for Axelar Network.

item.title: Rust Protocol Engineer · Interop Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5+ years protocol/blockchain engineering; strong Rust; CosmWasm/Solana expertise; deep cryptographic knowledge for cross-chain protocol development.

item.title: Full Stack Engineer · Interop Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。3–5 years full-stack web3 experience; React/Next.js/Node.js; DeFi product experience; cross-chain protocol integration skills.

item.title: Integrations Engineer · Interop Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Experience integrating with cross-chain protocols and bridging SDKs; strong API/SDK knowledge; web3 tooling and Axelar integration experience.

item.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer · BCB Group
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · London, UK · $90k–$115k。10+ years software engineering; TypeScript/Node.js/NestJS; microservices; Google Cloud/Kubernetes; MySQL/PostgreSQL; interest in crypto/blockchain; fintech/bank

item.title: Product Manager – Trading & Liquidity (Crypto/Fiat) · BCB Group
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · London, UK · 面议。Crypto payments/trading product background; experience shipping crypto-fiat products; stakeholder management; knowledge of Ethereum/Bitcoin; collaboration with

item.title: Compliance Manager – Zurich · BCB Group
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Zurich, Switzerland · 面议。Compliance management in crypto/fintech; understanding of Swiss financial regulations; experience with digital asset regulatory frameworks.

item.title: Treasury Analyst · BCB Group
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Johannesburg, South Africa · 面议。Treasury and liquidity management in crypto/fintech; experience with multi-currency fiat and crypto asset management; analytical skills.

item.title: Security Researcher and Engineer (Smart Contracts) · HashCloak
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。1+ year smart contract auditing on EVM/Ethereum; understanding of reentrancy, overflow, front-running; Go/Rust/Python skills; excellent English communication.

item.title: Security Researcher and Engineer (Cryptography) · HashCloak
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Strong cryptography background; ZKP/MPC research experience; formal methods; blockchain security research; academic or applied cryptography preferred.

item.title: Smart Contract Auditor · Runtime Verification
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Proven Ethereum smart contract auditing experience; Solidity/EVM proficiency; familiarity with formal verification tools; CS/SE degree; ability to write smart c

item.title: Smart Contracts Security Researcher & Engineer · Least Authority
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Experience with Solidity/Michelson/Clarity; smart contract security analysis across Ethereum, Tezos, Cosmos ecosystems; part-time or full-time contract role.

item.title: Security / Cryptography Researcher & Engineer · Least Authority
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Deep cryptography/security research background; blockchain protocol security analysis; experience with formal security proofs and cryptographic protocol design.

item.title: Smart Contract Auditor · Advanced Blockchain
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote (CET overlap) · 面议。5+ years software engineering; Solidity/EVM expertise; hardhat/geth; TypeScript proficiency; fuzzing and formal verification preferred; English communication sk

item.title: Investment Manager / Director (Web3) · YZi Labs
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote / Hong Kong · 面议。Web3 venture investment experience; deal sourcing and due diligence across DeFi/AI/blockchain; portfolio management; strong network in crypto ecosystem.

item.title: Web3 Investment Analyst · YZi Labs
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote / APAC · 面议。Blockchain/DeFi analysis; tokenomics modeling; market research for Web3/AI investments; strong quantitative and English communication skills.

item.title: Community Manager – Philippines · Nibiru Chain
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Philippines · 面议。Crypto community management background; fluency in English and Tagalog; experience with Discord/Telegram/Twitter; ability to facilitate local in-person events.

item.title: Community Manager – Thailand · Nibiru Chain
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Thailand · 面议。Crypto community management background; fluency in English and Thai; experience with Discord/Telegram/Twitter; ability to facilitate local in-person events.

item.title: Community Manager – Indonesia · Nibiru Chain
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Indonesia · 面议。Crypto community management background; fluency in English and Bahasa Indonesia; experience growing L1 blockchain communities; local event facilitation.

item.title: Community Lead – Singapore / Taiwan / Hong Kong · Nibiru Chain
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Singapore / Taiwan / Hong Kong · 面议。Proven track record expanding L1 blockchain communities; web3 community strategy; bilingual Chinese/English preferred; experience with DeFi/GameFi ecosystem.

item.title: Senior Product Manager, AI Productivity · Coinbase
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote, USA · 面议。5+ years product management; demonstrated track record launching technology products; experience with AI productivity tools; ability to define product vision an

item.title: Product Manager, Consumer · Coinbase
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote, Singapore · 面议。Consumer product management experience; understanding of crypto user needs in APAC; collaboration with engineering and design teams to ship consumer crypto feat

item.title: Senior Software Engineer, Blockchain – Developer Product Group · Coinbase
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote, USA · 面议。Blockchain technology expertise (Bitcoin/Ethereum); Golang/Ruby/Rails/Docker/Postgres; designing and scaling backend services and infrastructure for developer-f

item.title: Staff Data Engineer, Blockchain Data · Coinbase
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote, USA · 面议。Blockchain data pipeline engineering; building tooling to ingest data from blockchain APIs/files/databases; strong data engineering and ETL skills at scale.

item.title: Software Engineer – Rust – Core Engineering · Kraken
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Strong Rust programming skills; experience building high-performance backend systems; exchange or financial infrastructure background preferred.

item.title: Senior Software Engineer – Full-stack – Growth Product · Kraken
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Full-stack engineering experience (React + backend); growth product feature development; A/B testing and experimentation at scale; crypto exchange context prefe

item.title: Senior Software Engineer – Backend – Growth Platform · Kraken
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Senior backend engineering; building scalable growth infrastructure for crypto exchange; microservices architecture; data-driven growth features.

item.title: Senior Software Engineer – Frontend – Consumer · Kraken
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Senior frontend engineering (React); consumer-facing product development for crypto exchange; performance optimization; collaboration with design and product te

item.title: iOS Engineer (Web3) · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。iOS 开发（Swift/Objective-C）3 年以上，熟悉 Web3 钱包集成、区块链 SDK，有加密货币 App 经验优先。

item.title: Frontend Engineer · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。前端工程师，3 年以上 React/TypeScript 经验，熟悉 ethers.js/Web3.js，有 DeFi 或 NFT 产品经验优先。

item.title: Senior DevOps Engineer · ENS Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5 年以上 DevOps/SRE 经验，熟悉 Kubernetes、AWS/GCP、CI/CD 流水线，有区块链节点运维经验优先。

item.title: Web3 Partnerships Manager · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。3 年以上 Web3/DeFi 生态合作经验，熟悉 oracle/跨链协议，具备协议级合作谈判能力，crypto-native 优先。

item.title: Web3 Venture Capital & Strategic Partnerships Manager · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5 年以上 VC 或战略合作经验，深度理解 Web3 生态投资逻辑，能独立推进协议级战略合作，VC 背景优先。

item.title: Partnerships Lead - Banking & Capital Markets (North America) · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 负责人/总监 · Remote (North America) · 面议。金融机构/资本市场合作负责人，8 年以上 BD 经验，有 TradFi 向 DeFi 桥接项目经验，熟悉 Chainlink CCIP/DECO 优先。

item.title: Engineering Manager, Infrastructure · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。带领基础设施团队，8 年以上工程经验含 3 年管理，熟悉分布式系统、链下计算基础设施，有区块链节点管理经验。

item.title: Junior Data Engineer, Economics · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。数据工程入门级，熟悉 Python/SQL，有链上数据分析或经济学建模经验优先，研究生学历或同等经验。

item.title: Research Engineer · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。研究型工程师，密码学/分布式系统/ZK 背景，熟悉 Rust/Go，能将学术成果转化为生产级实现，博士或同等经验优先。

item.title: Senior Blockchain Engineer · InfStones
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5 年以上区块链工程经验，熟悉 EVM/Cosmos/Solana，精通 Solidity 及多链生态，有节点基础设施开发经验。

item.title: Application Engineer · InfStones
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。3 年以上后端/应用开发经验，熟悉 Web3 RPC/API，有 DeFi 协议集成或 SDK 开发经验，Go/Python/Node.js 均可。
